overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's industrial district beneath massive elevated highways, passing the Arasaka corporate facility with distinctive neon signage during golden hour with long shadows and warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway emerging into open street

events.description: character walks from deep shadow of overpass into direct golden hour sunlight
pedestrians cross the street ahead from right to left while sedan drives through

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, approaching a street crossing with pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left
sedan driving along the road under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure creating deep shadow overhead
underside of the elevated highway with visible support beams
traffic signal and street signs at the intersection ahead
metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the road
industrial chain link fencing along the far side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking under a massive concrete highway overpass in a semi-covered urban environment. As they move forward, they emerge from shadow into golden hour sunlight around the 6-second mark, approaching a street where pedestrians are crossing and a sedan drives by. The elevated highway structure dominates the upper frame while industrial buildings line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway ramps

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the Arasaka corporate tower against the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway beneath the elevated highway, glancing up at the towering corporate buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding
tall corporate skyscraper with the Arasaka logo visible on upper floors
tall security fencing with vertical bars along the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete pathway beneath the massive elevated highway structure, the industrial warehouse district becomes visible on the left. The camera pans upward around the 20-second mark to reveal the imposing Arasaka corporate tower rising against the golden sky, its upper floors catching the sunlight while the walkway remains in partial shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka corporate facility entrance with security barriers

events.description: approaching the Arasaka facility entrance with illuminated white neon signage
character passes the red glowing road closed barriers and continues along the perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking past the Arasaka corporate entrance, observing the security barriers and neon signage before continuing along the fence line

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in hat and tank top walking in opposite direction past the character

entered.detail: covered entrance structure with black facade and white neon trim
illuminated white 'ARASAKA' text logo with circular corporate emblem
red illuminated barriers with 'ROAD CLOSED' text blocking the entrance
small security booth structure with red neon lighting at the facility entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Arasaka corporate facility entrance, marked by bright white neon signage and red illuminated 'ROAD CLOSED' barriers. The camera moves past the security checkpoint area around the 35-second mark, where a pedestrian in a hat passes by in the opposite direction, before continuing along the perimeter fence line.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway approaching dark tunnel passage

events.description: entering deeper shadow under the highway overpass as the environment darkens significantly
pedestrian in white shirt passes close by on the right, temporarily occupying the foreground

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper under the highway overpass toward a darker tunnel-like passage with diminishing light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white shirt and bag walking toward the camera in the shaded walkway

entered.detail: dark concrete underpass tunnel creating a shadowed corridor ahead
large concrete support archway marking the tunnel entrance
deeply shadowed passage under the highway with limited visibility

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Arasaka facility, the walkway leads deeper under the highway structure into increasingly shadowed territory. The lighting shifts to low-light conditions around the 45-second mark as the character approaches a tunnel-like underpass, with the concrete architecture creating an enclosed, cavernous atmosphere. A pedestrian passes by in the dimming light as the scene grows darker toward the tunnel entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete industrial district that transitions from bright golden hour sunlight into a dim, cavernous underpass. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving from deep shadow into warm sunlight as the camera passes pedestrians and a driving sedan. As the character continues along the concrete pathway, the view expands to reveal an imposing Arasaka corporate tower rising against the golden sky before shifting toward the facility's entrance, marked by bright white neon signage and red illuminated barriers. The camera then glides past a security checkpoint and along a perimeter fence, where the lighting gradually fades as the path leads deeper under the highway structure. Finally, the scene shifts into low-light conditions, moving past a lone pedestrian and into the enclosed, shadowed atmosphere of a tunnel-like underpass.
